{{Quote|Igpek Droon—he's a buddy of mine on the Antemeridian route—he ''hates'' to have even his droids call him 'boss.' Spent a pile reprogramming every droid on his ship to call him 'friend' and 'comrade.' He was raised by Agro-Militants—would you believe it?—and he says it's just sand in his gills to have anything subordinate to him. Has a terrible time whenever he gets a Gamorrean or a Griddek in his crew, spends the whole time arguing with them over what they're going to call him.|[[Yarbolk Yemm]], to [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|<ref name="PoT">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>}}
'''Igpek Droon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] small-time trader raised by [[Agro-Militants]].

==Biography==
Droon had a strong dislike of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] or other [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings which acted as subordinates when they worked for him. Due to this, he later spent a fortune having the programming of his droids changed so they would call him friend or comrade.

[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] would later use Droon's name as an alias so he and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] could escape off of [[Nim Drovis]].
